description_long: This is a finely detailed bust sculpture of a man with wavy, voluminous hair and a stern, focused expression. The figure is dressed in a classical style, featuring a high-collared shirt with a cravat and a jacket, all rendered with intricate folds and textures. The bust is mounted on a rectangular pedestal base adorned with a decorative relief. The hair is sculpted with dynamic, flowing lines, and the facial features are sharply defined, conveying a sense of intensity and character. The back of the sculpture shows the hair cascading down in thick locks, while the sides reveal the depth and craftsmanship of the garment's folds. The material appears to be a smooth, light-colored stone or plaster, giving the sculpture a refined and classical appearance.
description: A detailed bust of a man with wavy hair and classical attire, mounted on a decorative pedestal and rendered in smooth, light-colored stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intense facial expression, detailed hair, and classical clothing with a decorative pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the hair and the layered folds of the jacket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sculpted hair from behind and the broad shoulders of the bust.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the profile of the face and the intricate hair and garment details.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
